info.dataSafe: Your data and orders are safe

terms.heroSubtitle: By making a purchase on CFPD TryOn, you unreservedly accept these Terms & Conditions.
terms.ctaSubtitle: Our terms are clear, fair, and designed to protect your rights.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing the CFPD TryOn website and making a purchase, you unreservedly accept these Terms & Conditions. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our site.
acceptance.note: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect as soon as they are published.

products.title: 2. Products and Prices
products.item1: Product characteristics are described as accurately as possible.
products.item2: All prices are shown in FCFA and reflect those in effect at the time of order.
products.item3: Products remain the property of CFPD TryOn until full payment has been received.

order.title: 3. Order
order.step1: Select the products you want and add them to your cart.
order.step2: Sign in or create an account after confirming your cart.
order.step3: Choose your delivery address and payment method.
order.step4: Review your order details and total price before finalizing.
order.step5: Confirming the order constitutes acceptance of these Terms and forms the sales contract.

payment.title: 4. Payment
payment.item1: We accept payment by credit card, mobile money, and bank transfer.
payment.item2: Payment is due immediately upon ordering.
payment.item3: All transactions are secure and encrypted using SSL technology.

shipping.title: 5. Shipping
shipping.item1: Products are delivered to the address provided at checkout.
shipping.item2: Delivery times are estimates and may vary based on availability.
shipping.item3: If a delay exceeds 7 business days, you may cancel your order.

returns.title: 6. Right of Withdrawal and Returns
returns.p1: In accordance with our returns policy, you have 15 calendar days from receipt to return a product that doesn't suit you.
returns.noteBefore: Detailed terms are available on our

warranty.title: 7. Warranty
warranty.item1: Products are covered by the legal warranty of conformity.
warranty.item2: Keep your purchase receipt to make use of the warranty.

sizeGuide.heroSubtitle: For a flawless fit with our virtual fitting room, follow these simple steps to take your measurements.

measuring.title: How to take your measurements
measuring.intro: To ensure a perfect fit with our virtual fitting room, please follow these simple steps:
measuring.tip: Tip: for more accuracy, ask someone to help you take your measurements.

chest.title: Chest
chest.desc: Measure around the fullest part of your chest, keeping the tape horizontal.

waist.title: Waist
waist.desc: Measure around the narrowest part of your waist, usually at navel level.

hip.title: Hips
hip.desc: Measure around the fullest part of your hips and seat.

legLength.title: Leg length
legLength.desc: Measure from the crotch to the floor, barefoot.

table.title: Size chart
table.subtitle: All measurements are in centimeters (cm).
table.note: These measurements are indicative. For the best fit, use our virtual try-on feature.

between.title: Between two sizes?
between.intro: If your measurements fall between two sizes, here are our recommendations:
between.item1: For tops and dresses: choose the larger size if your chest is bigger.
between.item2: For pants and skirts: choose the larger size if your hips are bigger.
between.item3: If in doubt, feel free to contact us for personalized advice.

sizeGuide.ctaSubtitle: Use your measurements to find your ideal size in our virtual fitting room.

shipping.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about delivery of your orders from CFPD TryOn.

zones.title: Delivery Zones
zones.note: For international deliveries, please contact us directly.

express.title: Express Delivery
express.main: 1–2 business days for Douala and Yaoundé
express.other: 2–3 business days for other major cities

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.desc: Once your order has shipped, you'll receive an email with your tracking number. You can track your package in real time on our site or directly on the carrier's website.

shipping.ctaSubtitle: Enjoy our fast and reliable delivery service throughout Cameroon.

returns.heroSubtitle: Everything you need to know about returning or exchanging items from CFPD TryOn.

delay.title: Return Window
delay.textAfter: from the date you receive your order to return an item that doesn't suit you.
delay.note: This window is extended during holiday periods (Christmas, New Year, etc.).

conditions.title: Return Conditions
conditions.item1: The item must be in its original condition, unworn, unwashed, and with all tags attached.
conditions.item2: The item must be in its original packaging.
conditions.item3: Personalized or custom-made items cannot be returned.

process.title: Return Process
process.step1: Sign in to your account on our site.
process.step3: Select the order containing the item to return.
process.step4: Click "Return an item" and follow the instructions.
process.step5: Print the return label and attach it to your package.
process.step6: Drop off your package at the nearest pickup point.
process.note: Return shipping costs are the customer's responsibility, unless the error is on our part.

returns.ctaSubtitle: With our clear and fair returns policy, shop risk-free.

privacyPolicy.heroSubtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our services.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.p1: At CFPD TryOn, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and secure your information when you visit our site or use our services.
introduction.consentNote: By using our site, you consent to the practices described in this policy.

personal.title: Personal information
personal.item1: Full name, email address, phone number
personal.item3: Payment details (processed by our secure partners, not stored by us)
personal.item5: Virtual try-on data (uploaded photos, body measurements)

technical.title: Technical information
technical.item1: IP address, browser type, operating system
technical.item2: Pages visited, visit duration, navigation paths

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.item1: To process your orders and provide our services
usage.item3: To improve our website and features
usage.item4: To send you communications related to your account
usage.item5: To prevent fraud and ensure security

card3.title: Regular audits
card3.desc: Periodic security review of our systems

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.item1: Right of access to your personal data
rights.item3: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.item1: Essential — necessary for the site to function

cta.title: Your data is safe
cta.subtitle: We protect your information with the highest standards of privacy.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions on CFPD TryOn.

livraison.label: Shipping
livraison.desc: Delivery times, address and package tracking

q1.question: How do I use the virtual try-on?
q1.answer: Choose a product, click on Virtual Try-On, upload your image and launch the simulation. The result allows you to visualize how the garment looks before buying.

q2.question: How do I track my order?
q2.answer: From your account, open the Orders section. You will be able to check the status and history of each order.

q3.question: Are my payments secure?
q3.answer: Yes. Transactions are processed through a secure gateway and sensitive information is not stored in plain text in the application.

q4.question: Can I return a product?
q4.answer: Returns are possible according to our general terms of sale. We recommend checking the return policy before making a request.

q5.question: How do I change my personal information?
q5.answer: Go to your profile, then click on Edit Profile. You can update your name, email, and phone number.

q6.question: What should I do if the try-on doesn't start?
q6.answer: Check your internet connection, reload the page, and try again. If the issue persists, contact support using the help center form.
